title: New ancient human relative unearthed in Egypt
description: Discovery of 18mn-year-old fossil suggests modern apes may have originated in northeastern Afro-Arabia

title: This Ancient Ape Fossil Could Change Where Humans Came From
description: A fossil from Egypt hints we’ve been searching for humanity’s ape ancestors in the wrong place. Researchers say a newly uncovered fossil ape from northern Egypt is changing how scientists think about early hominoid evolution. The discovery points to northern Africa, rather than the more commonly studied regions of East Africa, as a possible birthplace [...]
